title: Linear Programming and Constrained Optimization · Assumption Clinic
summary: Choose a fair production and distribution plan under limited resources. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in an explainable constrained optimization model and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Define decision variables, objective, constraints, units, and feasible domain.
Solve two-variable linear programs graphically and verify corner candidates.
Encode a constrained model for a solver and independently validate its solution.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-intermediate cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.

steps.title: Recalculate the repaired case
steps.instruction: Calculate the determinant of [[3, 1], [2, 6]]. Use the result to decide Optimization Ethics for an explainable constrained optimization model.
steps.why: The Optimization Ethics result for an explainable constrained optimization model is incomplete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: For a 2×2 matrix, determinant = ad − bc. Use (3 × 6) − (1 × 2). Reconcile the result with this competency evidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate whose costs and benefits an objective includes or omits.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Before calculating Optimization Ethics, predict the sign and approximate magnitude for an explainable constrained optimization model. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then reconcile it with that prediction and A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Evaluate whose costs and benefits an objective includes or omits.

hints: For a 2×2 matrix, determinant = ad − bc. Use (3 × 6) − (1 × 2).
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0 of the exact value.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Evaluate whose costs and benefits an objective includes or omits.

checks.description: The evidence cycle runs from problem framing through changed-case validation.
